Laminate flooring runs through the main living areas and bathrooms, while all three bedrooms feature fresh carpet and refinished spaces completed in 2022. The owner's suite offers a fireplace, double vanities, marble countertops, and a walk-in closet. The fully finished lower level (2021) includes exterior access, a bonus room that works great as an additional bedroom or home office, a full bathroom, and generous storage space. The living room, dining room, foyer, hallway, and both bedrooms were freshly painted in 2026, so everything feels crisp from the moment you walk in. An electric dog fence installed in 2022 is already in place for pet owners. Outside, the large corner lot has space for the outdoor play-set installed in 2023, a trampoline, garden, and still room to run and play. The neighborhood allows for easy evening walks and bike rides the whole family will enjoy. All of this with Jackson School System minutes away from The Marketplace at Nobles Pond. With updates made consistently over the years, this home has been well cared for and it shows. Homes like this don't come around often.

mismatches.Public_Remarks: Welcome to this stunning custom-built ranch, perfectly positioned at the end of a cul-de-sac in the desirable Shepards Gate Allotment, served by the North Canton School District. Built in 2016 by Sonoma Homes, this 3 bedroom, 2.5 bath home was designed with both elegance and ease of living in mind. Step inside to an open floor plan showcasing real hardwood floors, crown molding, cathedral ceilings, and a warm gas fireplace that anchors the living space. The dining room adds architectural charm with decorative pillars, while the kitchen impresses with granite countertops, an island with sink, and plenty of room to gather. The spacious main-floor primary en suite offers a true retreat with double sinks and a walk-in shower with bench. All solid doors throughout the home are fully accessible, making this a rare find for those seeking long-term comfort and convenience. A main-floor laundry room with utility sink and built-in storage adds even more everyday functionality. The fun continues in the finished basement, featuring a live-edge bar area, cozy living room, plumbing already in place for an additional bathroom, and a large storage room—perfect for hobbies, guests, or future expansion. Outside, relax and entertain on the covered back porch, enjoy evenings around two fire pits, or spread out on the additional paver patio. Thoughtfully designed perennial landscaping keeps maintenance easy, while the shed—complete with a loft and covered front porch—adds extra character and storage. Rounding out the home is a 3-car garage with attic space, plus a convenient location near Canton Akron Airport for effortless commuting, all nestled in Lake Township. This home truly blends beauty, function, and accessibility—don’t miss this incredible opportunity to make it yours!

One-Level Living at Its Finest in Canal Fulton! Welcome home to this meticulously maintained three-bedroom, three-bath, brick ranch, where comfort meets convenience. Situated on a deep, level lot, this home offers the ease of main-floor living with a dedicated laundry room just steps away from the bedrooms. You’ll have peace of mind for years to come thanks to a brand-new roof and a newly installed fence—perfect for privacy. Inside, the home shines with double-hung windows and a layout that is both well-built and lovingly cared for. The true "hidden gem" is the incredible basement; featuring a full bath, it is the perfect setup for a private in-law suite, a teenager's retreat, or the ultimate hobby space. Outside, the property continues to impress with a brand-new 12x24 shed, offering massive storage or workshop potential. This move-in-ready home is just waiting for your personal touch. Don’t wait—schedule your private showing today before someone else makes this dream home theirs!

1st floor living! Very nice all brick ranch home located conveniently in Glenhaven Village. Easy access to Rt 62 and workplaces in Canton or Alliance. This home has many amenities: formal living room, great room with gas fireplace, laundry located on the 1st floor (hidden in double closet), 1st floor owners' bedroom with ensuite half bath, a full bathroom with newer walk-in shower, and some newer vinyl windows. Large basement with additional shower room and plenty of storage. Oversized 2.5 car garage is attached.  Outside is a fantastic place to entertain with an inground pool, natural gas grill and additional charcoal grill, all fenced in.

Spacious contemporary style home with over 3,000 square feet located in the desirable Shallow Creek neighborhood!!  With vaulted ceilings and an open airy layout, this home has so much to offer.  The inviting living room features a fireplace that is positioned just off of the dining room and kitchen that is ideal for entertaining and everyday living.  The main level features a welcoming large kitchen showcasing tall oak cabinets, granite counters and french doors leading out to the private, fenced backyard.  The primary suite features a huge walk in closet and private bath with french doors leading to the backyard.  The additional bedrooms are generously sized for a large family, guest accommodations, or use for a home office. The expansive lower level has been renovated and offers an additional amount of space for recreation or for any hobbies one may have.  Step outside and enjoy the spacious outdoor entertaining area featuring a concrete patio with above ground swimming pool, the perfect setting for good times.  This home has so much to offer with size, style and a location that is hard to beat including a whole house generator.  Come and see today!

Sunscape Estates is a smaller neighborhood beautifully surrounded by vacant land but yet close to everything that is needed. On a .32 acre lot you will find this fantastic colonial built in 2005 and you are going to love it! It's light, fresh, and modern in every way. Going right to the remodeled kitchen, you'll find earth tone concrete countertops, white washed cabinets, an eating bar, and walk-in pantry. There is plenty of room for a dining table or use the attached formal dining space for your larger pieces. The adjacent family room has a fireplace wall as a focal point and ample space for your furniture. Convenience is key and that's another reason to appreciate the guest half bath and laundry directly off the garage entry. The second floor is home to 3 bedrooms and two full baths. Not just any bathrooms, they have both been thoughtfully updated. The owner's suite has a large walk-in closet and the spa-like ensuite bath is a dream with a corner, soaking tub, custom tiled walk-in shower, and quartz tops on the double vanity. Adding more living space to the 2,046 sq.ft. plan is the lower level complete with 2 different rec room spaces, another updated full bath, and a bonus room with a closet. Not even close to being done, the outside features are spectacular. Step from the kitchen area to a large covered patio overlooking the 18x36 pool, hot tub, and pool shed. You'll enjoy the privacy given by the extensive landscaping and tall privacy fencing as well. Another bonus is the extra large storage structure at the front of the house. Large enough to store a car or any of your toys, this is a great feature. Plus, the owner is providing a 1-year warranty to the next owner. This is your new home!

Welcome home to this beautifully updated 3-bedroom, 2.5-bath home in the heart of Louisville, situated on a rare double lot just minutes from parks, the splash pad, and downtown shops! Additional updates include updated lighting fixtures, chimney cap, basement exhaust fan, and more. Don't wait to view this move-in ready home and call it your own!

mismatches.Public_Remarks: Escape to your own slice of paradise with this beautifully maintained home nestled on a generous 5.2 acres in the heart of Paris, Ohio. This enchanting property offers a perfect blend of modern amenities and serene country living. Step outside to discover your own backyard haven, featuring a heated pool surrounded by a large deck. This idyllic space is perfect for sun-soaked afternoons, weekend barbecues, and memorable gatherings with friends and family. The vast grounds offer endless possibilities for outdoor activities, gardening, or simply enjoying the tranquility of nature. The property includes a spacious heated 2.5 car garage, providing ample space for your vehicles and additional storage.  As you enter the home, you are greeted by a bright and airy open floor plan that seamlessly connects the kitchen and living room.  The kitchen boasts modern appliances, ample cabinetry, and a convenient layout. A large entryway from the side of the house leads directly into this space, making grocery trips a breeze. The lower level features an additional living space complete with a charming fireplace that can be wood burning with an insert, ideal for those chilly Ohio winters. Heading to the 2nd level you will find 3 spacious bedrooms and a full bath. The lower level laundry room adds convenience to your daily routine, and had a new water softener installed last year. Don’t miss this opportunity to make this stunning property your new home! Contact me today for a private showing!
